mission.title: karmada: Proposal for English meeting time
mission.description: Proposal for English meeting time. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current karmada deployment
steps.description:
Verify your karmada version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n karmada -l app.kubernetes.io/name=karmada
helm list -n karmada 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working karmada installation.

steps.title: Review karmada configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant karmada configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n karmada -l app.kubernetes.io/name=karmada
kubectl get configmap -n karmada -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=karmada
```
For now, the community running [a regular bi-weekly](https://github.com/karmada-io/karmada#meeting) meeting with Chinese.

We are glad to set up another meeting with folks who speak English.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Proposal for English meeting time
steps.description:
This PR proposed the regular English community meeting based on #1560, the first call on `Tuesday, May 16th`([Convert to your time](https://dateful.com/convert/pt-pacific-time?t=08&d=2023-05-16)). 

Please feel free to add your agenda on the [meeting notes](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1y6YLVC-v7cmVAdbjedoyR5WL0-q45DBRXTvz5_I7bkA/edit?pli=1#heading=h.xom4jxumka6a).  (By [joining the google groups](https://groups.google.com/forum/#!forum/karmada) you will be able to edit the meeting notes.)

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n karmada -l app.kubernetes.io/name=karmada
kubectl get events -n karmada --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Proposal for English meeting time" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
This PR proposed the regular English community meeting based on #1560, the first call on `Tuesday, May 16th`([Convert to your time](https://dateful.com/convert/pt-pacific-time?t=08&d=2023-05-16)). 

Please feel free to add your agenda on the [meeting notes](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1y6YLVC-v7cmVAdbjedoyR5WL0-q45DBRXTvz5_I7bkA/edit?pli=1#heading=h.xom4jxumka6a).

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with karmada installed or the issue environment reproducible.
